responsibilities: Provides a structured form for reporting bugs in ArchSpine
Covers required fields: description, reproduction steps, version, logs, environment
Ensures consistency and completeness of bug reports for maintainers

English.purpose: This document exists to standardize how bugs are reported in the ArchSpine project, ensuring that every bug report contains the essential information needed for diagnosis and resolution.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for users and contributors who encounter bugs while using ArchSpine. It guides them to provide a clear description, steps to reproduce, version details, relevant logs, and environment info. Maintainers rely on this template to triage and fix issues efficiently.
key_takeaways: Always include a concise description of the bug and exact reproduction steps.
Provide the ArchSpine version (`spine --version` or from package.json).
Include any relevant logs, especially from `.spine/logs/`.
Specify your OS and Node.js version to help isolate environment-specific issues.
